events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: MTV, the groundbreaking music television channel, first launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with a song that ironically predicted its own impact. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Beginnings
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. The album that launched a thousand singalongs and defined a generation. What's your top track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in counter-culture history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: This day marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world lost a legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose powerful voice and lyrics still resonate today. He would have been 55.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: This day marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: 56 years since the world said goodbye to Jimi Hendrix, a true innovator who redefined the electric guitar. His music lives on. He would have been 84.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and arguably the most famous album cover of all time. Which track is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and a voice that still captivates.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye's distinctive vocalist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 49 years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and hope is as powerful today as it ever was.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music.

angles.name: Your Music, Everywhere
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple changed the game for music lovers everywhere. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the enduring film franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate 007 theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday, celebrating the life and music of The Beatles legend.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music, his message, forever.
